name: calorie-snap-v1-sprint2-2c-ncnn
title: calorie-snap-v1-sprint2-2c-ncnn
description: Sprint 2.2-C：用 Android YOLOv8-seg + ncnn 替换 ML Kit Subject Segmentation。本轮范围仅限 Phase C：C++ 端加载 ncnn 模型、640 letterbox 推理、YOLOv8-seg 后处理、合成前景 mask 并写出 PNG。ML Kit 依赖与 ForegroundSegmenterFactory 切换保留给 Phase D。
scope: android/app/src/main/cpp, android/app/src/main/assets, android/app/build.gradle.kts, android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml, android/app/src/main/kotlin/com/hashira/logic/fitness_log_app/segmentation, lib/features/snapshot, scripts
creator: sjzjams
notes: Phase C: C++ 端 ncnn 推理 + mask 写出 PNG + Kotlin JNI 封装,全部跑通,layout 假设 (1, 4+nc+nm, anchors) 已对齐。Phase D: ForegroundSegmenterFactory 默认走 ncnn(Android 真机),删除 ML Kit 依赖与 Kotlin 路径。

phases.B: done: ncnn prebuilt linked via CMake
phases.C: done: 640 letterbox + YOLOv8-seg 后处理 + mask PNG
phases.D: done: 删除 ML Kit 依赖与 manifest meta-data,ForegroundSegmentationPlugin.kt 精简到 132 行,只走 ncnn

verification.build: BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 4s (Phase D 验证)
verification.native_layout_assumption: det_out = (1, 116, 8400) = (1, 4+nc+nm, anchors),真机一次能 LOGI 验证
